subject: chore(claude-md): align with glow-props — 4 drift fixes from `align` pass
body:
Trigger: `align`. Compared section-by-section against glow-props
CLAUDE.md (fetched fresh via GitHub API). Found 3 real drifts + 1
bullet that glow-props removed upstream but is worth keeping locally.

1. Added 'Discontinued repos — skip entirely' bullet to AI Notes
   (`plant-fur` and `coin-zapp` are discontinued; don't include in
   cross-project operations). Placed immediately before the
   'Implementation patterns' bullet to match glow-props ordering.

2. Re-ordered Prohibitions: moved 'Create local copies of
   implementation pattern files' from last position to 3rd position,
   matching glow-props. Content unchanged, position differed.

3. Updated Documentation TODO-cleanup wording from 'delete completed
   items (git history tracks them)' to glow-props' clearer 'delete
   from TODO (git history tracks completions — no separate changelog
   needed)'.

4. Retained local 'NEVER use AskUserQuestion tool' rule with an
   explicit '(Local-only rule. Previously in glow-props; no longer
   upstream as of 2026-04-17. Retain unless there's evidence the
   tool's behaviour changed.)' annotation so future `align` passes
   don't re-flag it as drift. Rule was useful; no evidence the
   underlying tool behaviour has changed.

Shared sections (Process / Principles / Communication / Code
Standards / Prohibitions / Triggers) are now byte-identical to
glow-props. Project-specific augmentations (Project Status,
Architecture, Key State Structures, docs/DATA_EXTRACTION.md entry,
Docker / Proxy / AI_MISTAKES / project-spec / Trigger collision
notes) correctly remain — these are the expected local extensions
called out in the top-of-file blockquote.

Tags: claude-md, align, fleet, policy

Urgency: 2
Impact: internal

Debt: paid
